items.name: Grimoire
items.subtitle: AI-Native Workflow Automation
items.description: Describe what you want automated. Grimoire compiles it into a verified, inspectable workflow DAG — with simulation mode, human approval gates, a visual editor, and WhatsApp as a first-class channel. Claude is the compiler.

items.name: S2S MK1
items.subtitle: Full-Duplex Indic Speech Translation
items.description: Designing the first real-time, full-duplex speech-to-speech translation system for Indian languages — preserving the speaker's voice and accent across Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, and Hindi. Novel architecture built on Moshi's inner monologue, extended with a three-stage per-frame translation chain.
